name: Medicine
descriptions:
Medicine

The Medicine Department at AMZ Hospital Ltd. provides comprehensive, patient-centered care for a wide range of acute and chronic medical conditions. Our experienced physicians specialize in the prevention, diagnosis, and treatment of diseases affecting multiple organ systems, ensuring a holistic approach to patient well-being. With advanced diagnostic support, evidence-based treatment protocols, and a strong focus on early detection, we are committed to delivering safe, efficient, and compassionate care tailored to each individual’s needs.

Key Services & Procedures
  • ✓ General adult health check-ups, management of diabetes, hypertension, lipid disorders
  • ✓ Diagnostic services: ECG, echocardiography, pulmonary function tests, blood work, imaging coordination
  • ✓ Chronic disease management and lifestyle counseling
Common Conditions Treated
  • ✓ Hypertension, diabetes, cardiovascular risk factors
  • ✓ Infectious diseases (respiratory, GI, urinary)
  • ✓ Pulmonary conditions, endocrine and metabolic disorders
Departmental FAQs
Appointments can be booked via our website, call center, or in-person at the outpatient department.
Common investigations include ECG, blood tests, imaging studies, and other disease-specific diagnostic tests.
AMZ Hospital accepts major insurance plans; referrals can be coordinated by our staff as needed.
Visiting hours are available on our website; outpatient protocols follow scheduled appointments with safety guidelines.
tagline: Your journey to better health begins with the right diagnosis and the right doctor.

name: Oncology
descriptions:
Oncology

 

The Oncology Department offers comprehensive cancer care, from early detection and diagnosis to treatment and long-term follow-up. Multidisciplinary teams design personalized care plans using advanced therapies.

Key Services & Procedures
  • ✓ Chemotherapy & targeted therapy
  • ✓ Immunotherapy
  • ✓ Cancer surgery
  • ✓ Palliative care & pain management
  • ✓ Cancer screening programs
  • ✓ Post-treatment survivorship clinics
Common Conditions Treated
  • ✓ Breast, lung, colorectal cancers
  • ✓ Leukemia & lymphomas
  • ✓ Head & neck cancers
  • ✓ Gynecological cancers
  • ✓ Skin cancers
Departmental FAQs
Yes, in-person or via teleconsultation.
Yes, for symptom relief and quality of life improvement.
Yes, for common cancers.
tagline: “‘We don’t just treat cancer — we heal the person, their family, and their hope.’”

name: Cardiology
descriptions:
Cardiology

 The Cardiology Department at AMZ Hospital Ltd. provides comprehensive heart care—from prevention and diagnosis to advanced treatment of cardiovascular diseases. Our skilled cardiologists manage conditions such as hypertension, coronary artery disease, heart failure, arrhythmias, and valvular disorders. Equipped with modern diagnostic tools, including echocardiography, ECG, and stress testing, along with interventional facilities, we deliver precise, timely, and life-saving care for heart health.

Key Services & Procedures
  • ✓ Angiograms
  • ✓ Bypass surgery
  • ✓ Minimally invasive heart procedures
  • ✓ Management of heart failure and rhythm abnormalities
  • ✓ ECG, echocardiography, treadmill testing
  • ✓ Angiogram & angioplasty (PTCA)
  • ✓ Bypass surgery (CABG) coordination
  • ✓ Pacemaker implantation
  • ✓ Heart failure management
  • ✓ Preventive cardiology programs
Common Conditions Treated
  • ✓ Coronary artery disease
  • ✓ Hypertension
  • ✓ Rheumatic heart disease
  • ✓ Arrhythmias
  • ✓ Myocardial infarction
  • ✓ Heart failure
Associated Health Packages
  • ✓ General heart check-ups, lipid panels, and ECG bundles
  • ✓ Heart Health Check-Up
  • ✓ Post-Heart Attack Care Package
  • ✓ Hypertension & Cardiac Risk Program
Departmental FAQs
Appointments can be booked via our website, call center, or outpatient department.
Common investigations include ECG, echocardiography, stress testing, and other diagnostic tests as advised by the cardiologist.
AMZ Hospital accepts major insurance plans and online/offline payments.
Yes, 24/7 with a dedicated cardiac team.
Yes, through our cardiac wellness program.
Surgeries are coordinated with partner cardiac surgical units.
tagline: Every heartbeat matters — and we’re here to protect it.

name: Colorectal Surgery
descriptions:
Colorectal Surgery

The Colorectal Surgery Department at AMZ Hospital Ltd. specializes in the surgical management of diseases affecting the colon, rectum, and anus. Our team treats conditions such as colorectal cancer, inflammatory bowel disease, hemorrhoids, fistulas, and diverticular disease using advanced techniques—including minimally invasive and laparoscopic surgery—for faster recovery and better outcomes. We are committed to delivering safe, effective, and compassionate surgical care tailored to each patient’s needs.

Key Services & Procedures
  • ✓ Hemorrhoidectomy
  • ✓ Fistula & fissure surgery
  • ✓ Laparoscopic colorectal surgery
  • ✓ Colon cancer surgery
  • ✓ Stoma care & reversal
  • ✓ Anal sphincter repair
Common Conditions Treated
  • ✓ Hemorrhoids
  • ✓ Anal fissures & fistulas
  • ✓ Colorectal cancer
  • ✓ Diverticulitis
  • ✓ Inflammatory bowel disease
Associated Health Packages
  • ✓ Colorectal Cancer Screening Package
  • ✓ Hemorrhoid Treatment Package
  • ✓ Post-Colorectal Surgery Recovery Plan

descriptions:
Dermatology & Venereology

 

The Dermatology Department diagnoses and treats skin, hair, and nail disorders, offering both medical and cosmetic dermatology services.

tagline: “‘Because healthy skin is more than appearance — it’s confidence.’”

name: ENT
descriptions:
ENT (Ear, Nose & Throat)



The ENT Department specializes in diagnosing and treating disorders of the ear, nose, and throat—including surgical interventions and outpatient care.

Key Services & Procedures
  • ✓Hearing tests & hearing aid fitting
  • ✓Endoscopic sinus surgery
  • ✓Tonsillectomy & adenoidectomy
  • ✓Ear drum repair (tympanoplasty)
  • ✓Vertigo assessment
  • ✓Voice disorder management
Common Conditions Treated
  • ✓Sinusitis, chronic ear infections, hearing loss
  • ✓Nasal obstruction, throat disorders, head-neck tumors
Associated Health Packages
  • ✓Hearing Screening Package

You can book through our outpatient desk or via online appointment booking. Pre-surgical evaluation is required.

Yes, we have a dedicated audiology unit equipped for hearing tests and full audiometry assessments.
tagline: Clear hearing, easy breathing, healthy living.

name: Hepatology & Gastroenterology
descriptions:
Hepatology & Gastroenterology

 

The Hepatology & Gastroenterology Department at AMZ Hospital provides advanced diagnostic, therapeutic, and preventive care for liver, gallbladder, pancreas, and digestive tract disorders. Our specialists combine state-of-the-art technology with evidence-based medicine to manage complex gastrointestinal and hepatic conditions, from common digestive complaints to advanced liver disease.

Key Services & Procedures
  • ✓ Diagnostic endoscopy (Upper GI endoscopy, Colonoscopy, ERCP)
  • ✓ Liver disease management (Hepatitis B & C, fatty liver, cirrhosis)
  • ✓ Pancreatic disorder management
  • ✓ Gallbladder and biliary disease treatment
  • ✓ Capsule endoscopy
  • ✓ GI cancer screening and surveillance
  • ✓ Nutritional and lifestyle counseling for digestive health
Common Conditions Treated
  • ✓ Acid reflux (GERD), gastritis, peptic ulcers
  • ✓ Hepatitis B, Hepatitis C, alcoholic and non-alcoholic fatty liver disease
  • ✓ Irritable bowel syndrome (IBS), inflammatory bowel disease (IBD)
  • ✓ Gallstones and biliary tract obstruction
  • ✓ Pancreatitis
  • ✓ Liver cirrhosis and complications
  • ✓ Gastrointestinal bleeding
Associated Health Packages
  • ✓ Liver Health Screening Package
  • ✓ GI Cancer Screening Package
  • ✓ Digestive Wellness Package
FAQs
Persistent digestive discomfort, jaundice, unexplained weight loss, or abnormal lab tests.
Follow fasting instructions and bowel preparation guidelines provided by the department.
Yes, including antiviral therapy and liver disease management programs.
Yes, select diagnostic procedures are available on the same day.
tagline: Healthy digestion, healthier life.

name: General, Laparoscopic & Laser Surgery
descriptions:
General, Laparoscopic & Laser Surgery

The General, Laparoscopic & Laser Surgery Department at AMZ Hospital Ltd. provides surgical solutions for a wide range of conditions, from routine procedures to complex operations. Our surgeons are skilled in minimally invasive and laser techniques, ensuring reduced pain, minimal scarring, and faster recovery. We manage cases including hernias, gallstones, appendicitis, varicose veins, and other surgical conditions with precision and care.

Key Services & Procedures
  • ✓ General surgical procedures (hernia repair, appendectomy, gallbladder surgery)
  • ✓ Advanced laparoscopic (keyhole) surgeries
  • ✓ Laser-assisted surgeries (piles, fistula, varicose veins)
  • ✓ Minor surgical interventions under local anesthesia
  • ✓ Pre- and post-operative care and counseling
Common Conditions Treated
  • ✓ Gallstones and gallbladder diseases
  • ✓ Appendicitis
  • ✓ Hernia (inguinal, umbilical, incisional)
  • ✓ Hemorrhoids, anal fissures, fistula-in-ano
  • ✓ Varicose veins
  • ✓ Skin and soft tissue lumps or cysts
Associated Health Packages
  • ✓ Laser Hemorrhoidectomy Package
  • ✓ Keyhole Gallbladder Surgery Package
Departmental FAQs
Laparoscopic surgery is minimally invasive with small incisions and faster recovery, whereas open surgery involves larger incisions.
Recovery is usually quicker than conventional surgery; many patients return to work within 1–2 weeks, depending on procedure and healing.
Most major insurance plans cover laser surgeries; coverage depends on your policy and procedure type.
Pre-surgery preparation includes fasting, necessary lab tests, imaging, and following your surgeon's instructions carefully.
tagline: Precision surgery with minimal scars and maximum care

name: Gynecology & Obstetrics
descriptions:
Gynae & Obs.

The Gynecology & Obstetrics Department at AMZ Hospital Ltd. is dedicated to delivering comprehensive, compassionate, and evidence-based care for women at every stage of life—from adolescence through menopause and beyond. Our highly skilled team of obstetricians, gynecologists and specialized nurses offers a full spectrum of services, including routine and high-risk pregnancy management, advanced gynecological surgery, infertility evaluation, menstrual disorder treatment, and preventive women’s health screenings. With state-of-the-art facilities, modern diagnostic support, and a patient-centered approach, we ensure safety, dignity, and personalized attention for every woman we serve.

Key Services & Procedures
  • ✓ Antenatal & postnatal care
  • ✓ Normal & cesarean deliveries
  • ✓ Family planning services
  • ✓ Menopause management
  • ✓ Gynecological surgery (laparoscopy, hysterectomy)
  • ✓ Infertility evaluation
Common Conditions Treated
  • ✓ High-risk pregnancies
  • ✓ Menstrual disorders
  • ✓ PCOS
  • ✓ Fibroids
  • ✓ Gynecological cancers
Associated Health Packages
  • ✓ Pregnancy Care Package
  • ✓ Well Woman Health Screening
  • ✓ Menopause Wellness Package
Departmental FAQs
Yes, for newborn care.
Yes, epidural anesthesia is offered.
Yes, with multiple safe options.
tagline: Your partner in health and safe motherhood.

name: Haematology
descriptions:
Hematology

 

The Hematology Department at AMZ Hospital provides comprehensive diagnosis, treatment, and long-term management of blood disorders in both adults and children. Our expertise covers anemia, bleeding and clotting disorders, hematologic malignancies, and bone marrow diseases. The department works closely with Oncology, Pathology, and Transfusion Medicine for a multidisciplinary approach.

Key Services & Procedures
  • ✓Complete blood evaluation and diagnostic testing
  • ✓Bone marrow aspiration and biopsy
  • ✓Blood transfusion services with strict safety protocols
  • ✓Management of anemia (iron deficiency, vitamin-related, chronic disease)
  • ✓Treatment of bleeding disorders (hemophilia, platelet disorders)
  • ✓Clotting disorder evaluation and anticoagulation management
  • ✓Follow-up and monitoring of blood cancers (leukemia, lymphoma, myeloma)
Common Conditions Treated
  • ✓Iron deficiency anemia & other anemias
  • ✓Hemophilia & other clotting disorders
  • ✓Thrombocytopenia (low platelet count)
  • ✓Leukemia, lymphoma, and multiple myeloma
  • ✓Deep vein thrombosis (DVT) & other thromboembolic conditions
  • ✓Bone marrow disorders (aplastic anemia, myelodysplastic syndromes)
Departmental FAQs
Referral is not mandatory, but bringing previous reports helps for proper evaluation.
Yes, all transfusions are performed under strict safety protocols within the hospital.
Yes, the department handles leukemia, lymphoma, myeloma, and related conditions in coordination with Oncology.
tagline: ‘Every drop of blood tells a story — we ensure it’s a healthy one.’

name: Hepatobiliary & Pancreatic Surgery
descriptions:
Hepatobiliary & Pancreatic Surgery

The Hepatobiliary & Pancreatic Surgery Department at AMZ Hospital provides advanced, comprehensive surgical care for complex diseases of the liver, gallbladder, bile ducts, and pancreas. Our expert surgeons work closely with specialists in gastroenterology, oncology, radiology, and critical care to ensure precise diagnosis, optimal surgical planning, and seamless post-operative management.

Key Services & Procedures
  • ✓ Hepatectomy (partial or full), liver tumor resection, and cyst removal
  • ✓ Bile duct reconstruction, choledochal cyst excision, bile duct injury repair
  • ✓ Laparoscopic and open cholecystectomy for gallstones or gallbladder disease
  • ✓ Whipple procedure, distal pancreatectomy, enucleation of tumors
  • ✓ Minimally Invasive & Laparoscopic Procedures – Faster recovery, smaller scars
  • ✓ Surgery for liver, bile duct, and pancreatic cancers
  • ✓ Liver and pancreatic injury repair, diagnostic and therapeutic endoscopy
  • ✓ Liver function assessment and treatment
  • ✓ Hepatitis screening and management
  • ✓ Treatment of acid reflux, ulcers, and digestive disorders
Common Conditions Treated
  • ✓ Hepatocellular carcinoma, liver metastases, liver abscess, benign liver tumors
  • ✓ Gallstones, bile duct stones, bile duct cancer, biliary strictures
  • ✓ Pancreatic cancer, chronic pancreatitis, pancreatic cysts, insulinomas
  • ✓ Trauma-related injuries to liver, bile ducts, or pancreas
  • ✓ Complications from previous abdominal surgeries affecting the hepatobiliary system
Associated Health Packages
  • ✓ Liver Health Screening Package
  • ✓ GI Cancer Screening Package
  • ✓ Digestive Wellness Package
Departmental FAQs
Hospital stay depends on the type and complexity of surgery, typically ranging from 5–14 days with proper post-operative care.
Surgery can be curative for selected patients, often combined with chemotherapy or targeted therapy for optimal outcomes.
Yes, proper nutrition, quitting smoking, and managing co-morbidities improve surgical outcomes and recovery.
tagline: Healthy digestion, healthier life.

name: Interventional Pain Medicine
descriptions:
Interventional Pain Medicine

 

The Pain Medicine Department at AMZ Hospital Ltd. focuses on diagnosing and treating chronic pain conditions through advanced, minimally invasive procedures. Our team addresses back pain, neck pain, joint pain, neuropathic pain, and cancer-related pain using evidence-based techniques, including nerve blocks, epidural injections, and radiofrequency ablation. Our goal is to restore mobility, reduce dependence on medication, and improve quality of life.

Key Services & Procedures
  • ✓Interventional pain management (nerve blocks, injections)
  • ✓Chronic back and neck pain treatment
  • ✓Headache and migraine management
  • ✓Cancer pain control
  • ✓Physiotherapy and rehabilitation integration
Common Conditions Treated
  • ✓Sciatica and nerve compression
  • ✓Osteoarthritis and joint pain
  • ✓Fibromyalgia
  • ✓Post-surgical pain
  • ✓Neuropathic pain
FAQs
Yes, when performed by trained specialists, nerve blocks are generally safe with minimal risks.
Some patients feel relief within hours, while others may notice improvement over several days.
Yes, including physiotherapy, lifestyle modifications, and interventional therapies.
tagline: Because life is better when pain is under control.

name: Neurosurgery
descriptions:
Neuro Surgery

 

The Neurosurgery Department at AMZ Hospital provides advanced surgical care for disorders affecting the brain, spine, and peripheral nerves. Our team combines precise diagnostic evaluation, cutting-edge surgical techniques, and multidisciplinary rehabilitation to ensure optimal patient outcomes. We handle both emergency neurosurgical interventions and planned procedures for complex neurological conditions.

Key Services & Procedures
  • ✓Brain tumor surgery
  • ✓Aneurysm clipping and vascular neurosurgery
  • ✓Spine surgery (disc herniation, spinal stenosis, trauma)
  • ✓Minimally invasive and endoscopic neurosurgery
  • ✓Peripheral nerve surgery
  • ✓Management of head injuries and intracranial hemorrhages
Common Conditions Treated
  • ✓Brain tumors (benign and malignant)
  • ✓Traumatic brain and spinal injuries
  • ✓Stroke-related neurosurgical conditions

Recovery depends on the procedure; minor spine surgeries take a few weeks, brain tumor surgeries may require several months.
Yes, minimally invasive and endoscopic techniques are available where appropriate.

descriptions:
Orthopedic Surgery

 

The Orthopedic Surgery Department at AMZ Hospital Ltd. provides comprehensive care for musculoskeletal conditions, including fractures, joint disorders, sports injuries, and spinal problems. Our orthopedic surgeons specialize in joint replacement, arthroscopy, trauma surgery, and minimally invasive procedures, aiming for faster recovery and restored mobility.

  • ✓ Joint replacement surgery (hip, knee, shoulder)

Yes, minimally invasive joint surgery is offered for select cases, ensuring quicker recovery and less discomfort.
Yes, physiotherapy is available on-site for post-operative care and injury rehabilitation.
Yes, we have pediatric orthopedic expertise to manage bone and joint conditions in children.
tagline: Because movement is life — and we help you move freely.

name: Pediatric
descriptions:
Pediatrics

The Pediatrics Department at AMZ Hospital Ltd. is dedicated to the health and well-being of infants, children, and adolescents. Our pediatricians offer preventive care, growth and development monitoring, vaccination, and treatment of acute and chronic childhood illnesses. With child-friendly facilities and a compassionate approach, we ensure the best start for every child’s life.

Key Services & Procedures
  • ✓ Well-baby checkups & immunizations
  • ✓ Developmental assessment & monitoring
  • ✓ Pediatric infectious disease management
  • ✓ Asthma & allergy care
  • ✓ Neonatal follow-up
  • ✓ Pediatric nutrition counseling
Common Conditions Treated
  • ✓ Common childhood infections (respiratory, GI)
  • ✓ Growth and nutritional issues
  • ✓ Neonatal and developmental concerns

All EPI vaccines and additional recommended vaccines are provided based on age and health requirements.

name: Pediatric Surgeon
descriptions:
Pediatric Surgery

 

The Pediatric Surgery Department provides surgical care tailored to infants, children, and adolescents, with a focus on safety, precision, and minimal discomfort. Our pediatric surgeons are trained to handle a wide range of congenital and acquired surgical conditions.

Key Services & Procedures
  • ✓ Congenital anomaly correction
  • ✓ Hernia and hydrocele repair
  • ✓ Pediatric gastrointestinal surgeries
  • ✓ Circumcision and urological surgeries
  • ✓ Minimally invasive pediatric procedures
Common Conditions Treated
  • ✓ Cleft lip and palate
  • ✓ Undescended testes
  • ✓ Pediatric tumors
  • ✓ Intestinal malformations
  • ✓ Appendicitis in children
Departmental FAQs
The minimum age depends on the condition; surgeries can be performed even on newborns if medically required.
Most procedures are performed under general anesthesia for safety and comfort, but some minor cases may use local anesthesia.
Parents are guided with instructions on fasting, medication adjustments, and psychological preparation to ease the child’s experience.

name: Physical Medicine & Rehabilitation
descriptions:
Physical Medicine & Rehabilitation

We focus on restoring movement, function, and quality of life for patients recovering from injury, illness, or surgery. We provide individualized rehabilitation programs combining medical care, therapeutic exercises, and advanced rehabilitation technologies to maximize recovery outcomes. Our multidisciplinary approach integrates physicians, physiotherapists, occupational therapists, and speech therapists to ensure comprehensive patient care.

Key Services & Procedures
  • ✓Physiotherapy for musculoskeletal, neurological, and post-surgical conditions
  • ✓Pain management (non-surgical) for back pain, neck pain, arthritis, and sports injuries
  • ✓Stroke rehabilitation to improve mobility, balance, and daily functioning
  • ✓Post-orthopedic surgery rehabilitation (hip, knee, spine, shoulder)
  • ✓Neurological rehabilitation (spinal cord injury, Parkinson’s, multiple sclerosis)
  • ✓Pediatric rehabilitation for developmental and motor function issues
  • ✓Speech and swallowing therapy for post-stroke or neurological conditions
  • ✓Occupational therapy to improve daily activity performance
  • ✓Gait training and balance therapy
  • ✓Electrotherapy & therapeutic ultrasound for pain relief and muscle stimulation
Common Conditions Treated
  • ✓Stroke and paralysis recovery
  • ✓Sports injuries and ligament tears
  • ✓Chronic back pain, neck pain, and joint disorders
  • ✓Cerebral palsy and other pediatric developmental disorders
  • ✓Post-surgical stiffness or weakness
  • ✓Osteoarthritis and rheumatoid arthritis-related disability
  • ✓Neuropathies and nerve injuries
  • ✓Post-fracture or immobilization complications
Departmental FAQs
It depends on the surgery type; your physician will guide the safe start time.
Yes, home-based therapy is available in select cases.

Vascular Surgery

 

The Vascular Surgery Department at AMZ Hospital specializes in diagnosing, treating, and managing diseases affecting the arteries, veins, and lymphatic vessels. Our expert surgeons combine advanced surgical techniques with minimally invasive interventions to restore proper blood flow and prevent complications.

Key Services & Procedures
  • ✓Endovascular surgery (minimally invasive vessel repair)
  • ✓Bypass surgery for blocked arteries
  • ✓Varicose vein treatment (surgical & laser)
  • ✓Carotid artery surgery
  • ✓Dialysis access creation & maintenance (AV fistula, graft)
  • ✓Aneurysm repair (open & endovascular)
  • ✓Thrombectomy & clot removal
  • ✓Management of vascular trauma
Common Conditions Treated
  • ✓Peripheral artery disease (PAD)
  • ✓Varicose veins & chronic venous insufficiency
  • ✓Deep vein thrombosis (DVT)
  • ✓Aneurysms (aortic & peripheral)
  • ✓Carotid artery stenosis
  • ✓Vascular complications from diabetes
  • ✓Blood clot-related disorders
  • ✓Lymphedema
Departmental FAQs
Symptoms include leg pain, swelling, numbness, cold extremities, or varicose veins. Diagnostic tests confirm conditions.
No, many procedures are minimally invasive or endovascular depending on patient needs.
Yes, preoperative assessment and careful monitoring make surgeries safe for older patients.
tagline: ‘Healthy circulation, healthier life.’

name: Urology
descriptions:
Urology

 

The Urology Department provides surgical and medical care for urinary tract disorders in men and women, as well as male reproductive health.

Key Services & Procedures
  • ✓ Kidney stone removal (PCNL, ureteroscopy)
  • ✓ Prostate surgery (TURP, laser)
  • ✓ Bladder surgery
  • ✓ Urethral reconstruction
  • ✓ Male infertility treatment
Common Conditions Treated
  • ✓ Kidney & bladder stones
  • ✓ Prostate enlargement (BPH)
  • ✓ Urinary incontinence
  • ✓ Urinary tract infections
  • ✓ Male infertility
Associated Health Packages
  • ✓ Prostate Health Check
  • ✓ Kidney Stone Prevention Program
  • ✓ Male Fertility Evaluation Package
FAQs
Yes, including incontinence.

tagline: ‘Advanced solutions for urinary & men’s health.’

name: Diabetics, Hormone & Nutrition
descriptions:
Diabetic, Hormone & Nutrition

 

The department diagnoses and treats hormone-related disorders, including diabetes, thyroid, and metabolic diseases, as well as related nutritional issues.

Key Services & Procedures
  • ✓Diabetes management programs
  • ✓Thyroid ultrasound & FNAC
  • ✓Hormone replacement therapy
  • ✓Osteoporosis screening
  • ✓Obesity management
Common Conditions Treated
  • ✓Type 1 & 2 diabetes
  • ✓Thyroid disorders
  • ✓Adrenal disorders
  • ✓Pituitary disorders
  • ✓Osteoporosis
Departmental FAQs
Yes, with pediatric endocrine support.
Yes, with hands-on training.
Yes, as part of obesity management.
tagline: ‘Balancing hormones, balancing life.’

name: Surgical Oncology
descriptions:
Surgical Oncology

 

The Surgical Oncology Department focuses on surgical management of cancers, combining precision surgery with multidisciplinary care. We work closely with medical and radiation oncology teams for optimal outcomes.

Key Services & Procedures
  • ✓Tumor excision and organ-preserving surgeries
  • ✓Breast cancer surgery (lumpectomy, mastectomy)
  • ✓Gastrointestinal cancer surgery
  • ✓Head and neck cancer surgery
  • ✓Lymph node dissections
Common Conditions Treated
  • ✓Breast, colon, liver, and stomach cancers
  • ✓Head and neck malignancies
  • ✓Skin cancers (melanoma, basal cell carcinoma)
Departmental FAQs
Not always; surgery depends on cancer type, stage, and overall treatment plan with oncology team.
Surgery timing depends on the treatment plan and patient readiness, often coordinated with oncology.
Recovery varies by procedure; typically 4-8 weeks for major surgeries, with ongoing follow-up.
tagline: ‘Precision surgery in the fight against cancer.’

name: Pediatric Hematology and Oncology
descriptions:
Pediatric Hematology & Oncology

 

Our Pediatric Hematology & Oncology Department offers specialized care for pediatric blood disorders and cancers, including leukemia management, hemophilia treatment, and transfusion-related therapies in children.

Key Services & Procedures
  • ✓Leukemia & lymphoma treatment in children
  • ✓Anemia & bleeding disorder management
  • ✓Child-friendly chemotherapy support
  • ✓Family-centered psychosocial counseling
Common Conditions Treated
  • ✓Leukemia, lymphomas, other pediatric malignancies
  • ✓Anemias, bleeding disorders, hemoglobinopathies
Departmental FAQs
Initial consultation with pediatric oncologists is recommended, along with diagnostic tests and treatment planning.
Yes, transfusions are child-friendly and managed under strict safety protocols.
Counseling, psychosocial support, and educational guidance are provided for families throughout the treatment journey.
tagline: ‘Fighting illness with courage, care, and compassion — for every child.’

name: Liver & Gastroenterology
descriptions:
Liver & Gastroenterology



Our Liver & Gastroenterology Department specializes in the diagnosis, treatment, and management of liver, stomach, and intestinal disorders. We offer advanced endoscopic and minimally invasive procedures, supported by expert gastroenterologists and hepatologists.

Key Services & Procedures
  • ✓ Diagnostic and therapeutic endoscopy
  • ✓ Liver function assessment and treatment
  • ✓ Hepatitis screening and management
  • ✓ Treatment of acid reflux, ulcers, and digestive disorders
  • ✓ Nutritional counseling for digestive health
Common Conditions Treated
  • ✓ Hepatitis A, B, C
  • ✓ Cirrhosis and fatty liver
  • ✓ Peptic ulcer disease
  • ✓ Irritable bowel syndrome (IBS)
  • ✓ Gastroesophageal reflux disease (GERD)
Departmental FAQs
Hepatology focuses on liver-related conditions, while gastroenterology covers the digestive tract, including the liver, stomach, intestines, and pancreas.
Most endoscopic procedures are not painful, as they are done under sedation or local anesthesia for patient comfort.
Yes, lifestyle changes, weight loss, and proper medical management can often reverse fatty liver in its early stages.
tagline: Expert hands for the most delicate organs.
